question: What is the actual all-in cost of selling on each major Chinese e-commerce platform?

findings.claim: Alibaba Taobao/Tmall Customer Management Revenue (CMR) quarterly trend shows take rate inflection from software service fee, but impact phasing out by Dec 2025
findings.data: Q4 FY2025 (Mar 2025): CMR grew 12% YoY. Q1 FY2026 (Jun 2025): CMR returned to 10% growth. Q2 FY2026 (Sep 2025): CMR grew 10% YoY to RMB78,927M, driven by Quanzhantui penetration and software service fee. Q3 FY2026 (Dec 2025): CMR grew only 1% YoY to RMB102,664M due to weaker transactions and phaseout of software service fee impact. Full FY2025 revenue: ~996.4 billion yuan (+6% YoY). CMR growth expected at 9%/7%/6% in FY26F/27F/28F per DBS.

findings.claim: Alibaba Q2 FY2026 China E-commerce adjusted EBITA decreased 76% due to quick commerce investment
findings.data: Taobao and Tmall Group adjusted EBITA increased by 1% to RMB196,232M in FY2025. But in Q2 FY2026, China E-commerce adjusted EBITA decreased by 76%, primarily due to investment in quick commerce, user experiences, and technology. Alibaba generating ~40.4% of revenue via domestic e-commerce (subscriptions, commissions, transaction-based fees, value-added services, advertising).

findings.claim: Taobao app achieved double-digit YoY increase in monthly active consumers; 88VIP members surpassed 59 million
findings.data: The Taobao app achieved a double-digit year-over-year increase in monthly active consumers. 88VIP members surpassed 59 million. These engagement metrics support the narrative of stabilization after years of concern about structural decline.
